title: Wisp Shaders
description: Simple shaders that focus on looking good while remaining within the style of vanilla Minecraft instead of fancy realistic rendering techniques
body:
# **Wisp Shaders**
![A showcase of the fog effect and the color transition present during sunrises and sunsets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/fn1Eae1N/images/e16d4000b898846a790d530fbcc7f08b36cc3370.png)

Primitive shaders with **no fancy effects or PBR**, meant to make the game look good while sticking to the vanilla style.

# Features:
- Directional lighting, lightmap based
- More vibrant environment colors
- Custom clouds
- Adjustable fog
- Waving leaves
- Water foam effect
- Cloud reflections in water
- Rain puddles
# Compatibility
The shaders were developed and are intended for minecraft version **1.21.1 and up**, and Iris version **1.7 and up**, but **may** work on lower versions.

If tag support is present, the tag _**minecraft:leaves**_ will be used for waving leaves, otherwise leaves from **vanilla** and **Biomes O' Plenty** are used.
